title: TRAI’s crackdown on spam calls and AI-driven telemarketing
description: Unsolicited commercial communications—commonly experienced as spam calls and messages—have long undermined consumer trust in India’s telecom ecosystem. Despite years of regulation, the problem has intensified with the emergence of AI-enabled calling technologies, including robo-calls, automated diallers and voice-cloning tools that allow impersonation at scale. India ranks among the world’s spam hotspots, with consumers losing ₹36.45 lakh to fraud in just one year.According to the 2025 India Ins
